_comment: Paste these keys into ios/App/App/Info.plist after `npx cap add ios`
NSCameraUsageDescription: Marketer Pro uses your camera to capture images for your posts.
NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Marketer Pro accesses your photo library to attach images to posts.
NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Marketer Pro saves generated images to your photo library.
NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Marketer Pro uses your microphone for video content creation.
NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: We use analytics to improve the app experience. No data is sold to third parties.
